commands.name: FLOW-11 Playwright suites
commands.command: $env:VITE_PORT='5174'; $env:CLIENT_URL='http://localhost:5174'; $env:VITE_API_URL='http://localhost:33001'; $env:SERVER_URL='http://localhost:33001'; Push-Location client; npx playwright test e2e/schema-registry-dag.spec.ts e2e/topology/schema-registry-dag-topology-qa.spec.ts --reporter=list; Pop-Location

commands.name: client TypeScript
commands.command: Push-Location client; npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false; Pop-Location

commands.name: phase-close portability/auth scan
commands.command: FLOW-11 server flow scan for throw new, MicroserviceBase, nestjs-cls, direct SDK imports, and any types

notes: R-08 now enters the platform-admin DAG branch explicitly.
The main schema/DAG spec now uses the real FLOW-11 topology fixture for /api/topology/FLOW-11, matching the topology QA evidence path.
P1 coverage health checks use SERVER_URL/VITE_API_URL so Docker server port 33001 is supported.

docs/e2e-snapshots/repo-evidence.note: Repo evidence screenshots exist globally; FLOW-11 cascade-specific repo screenshots are produced during fork cascade phases.
